content.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
content.subHeading: Everything you need to know about our services

faqs.question: Do you help with SARS tax returns?
faqs.answer:
Yes, we assist individuals and businesses with all aspects of tax returns through the South African Revenue Service (SARS).

We help with:
• Individual Tax Returns (ITR12)
• Provisional Tax (IRP6)
• Company Tax Returns (ITR14)
• VAT Returns (VAT201)
• Tax clearance and compliance

faqs.question: What accounting software do you support?
faqs.answer:
We work with a range of modern, cloud-based accounting systems commonly used by small businesses in South Africa.

Popular software we support:
• Xero – Real-time cloud accounting with bank integration
• QuickBooks – Ideal for invoicing, expense tracking, and reporting
• Sage Accounting – SARS-compliant solution for small to medium businesses
• Zoho Books – VAT-compliant with strong automation features

Not sure which software to use?
We can recommend the best option based on your business and help you set it up.

Already using software?
We’ll work with your existing system and ensure everything is accurate and compliant.

faqs.question: Do I need monthly bookkeeping?
faqs.answer:
You should strongly consider monthly bookkeeping if you:
• Have regular sales and expenses
• Are VAT-registered
• Employ staff
• Want up-to-date financial reports
• Need to monitor cash flow

Monthly records help you stay compliant with SARS and avoid last-minute stress.

faqs.question: Can freelancers use your services?
faqs.answer:
Yes. We work with freelancers, independent contractors, and sole proprietors across many industries.

We help with tax returns, bookkeeping, and staying compliant with SARS—so you can focus on your work.

faqs.question: What are your response times?
faqs.answer:
We aim to respond promptly:
• Emails & messages: Within 24 hours (business days)
• Urgent queries: Same-day where possible
• Scheduled work: Turnaround times confirmed in advance

faqs.question: Do you offer custom packages?
faqs.answer: Yes, we offer custom packages tailored to your needs—whether you're a freelancer, startup, or growing business.
